vocab.word: a picture paints a thousand words
vocab.meaning: một bức ảnh thay cho ngàn lời nói
vocab.example: I always capture landscapes because a picture paints a thousand words when I try to describe my travels to others.

vocab.word: at the push of a button
vocab.meaning: vô cùng dễ dàng (chỉ bằng một nút bấm)
vocab.example: With modern smartphones, we can preserve a stunning mountain view at the push of a button.
While I take photos, I also try to keep the vivid colors of the sunset in my mind's eye for years to come.

vocab.meaning: dừng lại một khoảnh khắc (để lưu giữ)
vocab.example: Photography allows me to freeze-frame a fleeting moment of natural beauty that would otherwise disappear.

vocab.meaning: không thua kém bất kỳ ai/cái gì (vô đối)
vocab.example: The view from the top of the cliff was second to none, so I had to take several shots to do it justice.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (cảnh rất đẹp)
vocab.example: The golden rice terraces in autumn are a feast for the eyes and a dream subject for any photographer.
If you don't have your camera ready during the sunrise, you might miss the boat on the best lighting of the day.

vocab.meaning: không thốt nên lời (vì quá choáng ngợp)
vocab.example: Sometimes I am so lost for words by a panoramic vista that I forget to take a photo until the last minute.
Occasionally, a perfect double rainbow appears out of the blue, making for an incredible spontaneous photograph.

vocab.meaning: nắm bắt được/quen với cách làm gì
vocab.example: It took me a while to get the hang of capturing the stars at night, but the results are truly rewarding.
